qdrantUrl.label: Qdrant URL
qdrantUrl.help: Keep this on the local host when running under CodeShield.

collectionName.label: Collection
collectionName.help: True Recall collection used for auto-recall.

ollamaUrl.label: Ollama URL
ollamaUrl.help: Local Ollama endpoint used for query embeddings.

embeddingModel.label: Embedding Model
embeddingModel.help: Local Ollama embedding model for recall queries.

userId.label: User ID
userId.help: Restricts recall to a single trusted operator memory stream.

autoRecall.label: Auto Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant True Recall gems before the model answers.

maxRecallResults.label: Max Recall Results
maxRecallResults.help: Number of memories to inject into the prompt.

minRecallScore.label: Min Recall Score
minRecallScore.help: Ignore weak matches below this score.

apiKeyEnvVar.label: Qdrant API Key Env Var
apiKeyEnvVar.help: Environment variable loaded by CodeShield; never stored in plugin config.
